site.name: NEM Analytics
site.tagline: Open analysis of Australia's National Electricity Market
site.intro: Public-data dashboards on spot prices, price spikes, negative pricing, battery performance and weather-driven demand across the NEM. Rebuilt daily from AEMO NEMweb.
site.author: Your Name
site.footer_note: Built on public AEMO NEMweb data. Not affiliated with AEMO or any market participant.
